text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um, Digital… There's something I've been
meaning to ask you…

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm an open book! Please ask me
anything you want!!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Okay, thank you! I was wondering…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You looked really excited when you said
"This is totally going in the next volume!",
so I've been curious about it…!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: GASP! I… I can't believe… You mean I… said that out loud?! Don't tell me I was blabbing about my fantasies the whole time?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Are The Secret Race and The Feel of Your Tail popular manga right now? Or are they training books or something?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: HNNNGGG… You even know… the titles! N-No more… I'm… dying of cringe!!
